data.title: CHAPTER 6 — FIXING THE FILE WITH THE PLUGIN API
blocks: The Figma REST API is a query interface. It answers questions about a file's current state. The Plugin API is the editor

data.title: LOADING THE PLUGIN.
blocks: During development: open Figma Desktop, go to Plugins → Development → Import plugin from manifest, navigate to figma-fix
Loading the Plugin — For team distribution, publish to your organization's private plugin library through the Figma admin panel.

S06.meta: // SLIDE 06 — WHAT THE APPROVAL GATE IS FOR

data.title: WHAT THE APPROVAL GATE IS FOR.
blocks: NAME001 — Variable name violates the three-tier naming convention (wrong depth, invalid characters, unknown category)
TOK001 — Alias references a deleted variable ID
TOK002 — Semantic token has no description field
COMP001 — Component has no description field
data.section: WHAT THE APPROVAL GATE IS FOR

data.title: WHAT TO NEVER AUTOMATE.
blocks: Alias target changes.
Value changes.
Component restructuring.
Deletions.

data.title: THE BACKUP PATTERN.
blocks: Before any bulk fix run, create a version history checkpoint in Figma. File menu → Save to Version History → add a note
The Backup Pattern — If your plan does not include version history: File → Save local copy to export the file as .fig. This is a manual snaps
